samples.question: Find the streams that were created before 2018 and have more than 5,000 followers.
samples.schema:
Node properties:
- **Stream**
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2007-05-22T10:39:53.259969Z, Max: 2021-05-09T14:16:40.370294Z
  - `id`: STRING Example: "129004176"
  - `description`: STRING Example: "Welcome to my Channel, I'm Big Chase, 31 living in"
  - `url`: STRING Example: "https://www.twitch.tv/itsbigchase"
  - `name`: STRING Example: "itsbigchase"
  - `followers`: INTEGER Min: 0, Max: 10243195
  - `total_view_count`: INTEGER Min: 21, Max: 1451487256
- **Game**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "Rust"
- **Language**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "en"
- **User**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "itsbigchase"
- **Team**
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2011-10-11T23:59:43.548701Z, Max: 2021-05-07T17:19:09.946382Z
  - `name`: STRING Example: "ESO Stream Team"
  - `id`: STRING Example: "5893"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(:Game)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(:Language)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(:Team)
(:Stream)-[:VIP]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:VIP]->(:User)
(:User)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)
(:User)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)
(:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream)
(:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.createdAt < datetime('2018-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z') AND s.followers > 5000 RETURN s
samples.prediction: MATCH (s:Stream) WHERE s.createdAt < datetime('2018-01-01T00:00:00Z') AND s.followers > 50000 RETURN s.id, s.name, s.followers, COUNT(s) AS stream_count ORDER BY stream_count DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (s)-[:PLAYS]->(g:Game) RETURN s.id, s.name, stream_count ORDER BY stream_count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN s.name

samples.question: What are the top 5 tags used in questions with a score less than zero?
samples.schema:
Node properties:
- **Question**
  - `favorites`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `answered`: BOOLEAN 
  - `text`: STRING Example: "### This is:  Bug    ### Specifications  OS: Win10"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62224586/playg"
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2020-06-05T16:57:19Z, Max: 2020-06-05T21:49:16Z
  - `title`: STRING Example: "Playground is not loading with apollo-server-lambd"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 62220505, Max: 62224586
  - `upVotes`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `score`: INTEGER Example: "-1"
  - `downVotes`: INTEGER Example: "1"
- **Tag**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "aws-lambda"
- **User**
  - `image`: STRING Example: "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NcFYSuXU0nk/AAA"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/users/10251021/alexandre"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 751, Max: 13681006
  - `reputation`: INTEGER Min: 1, Max: 420137
  - `display_name`: STRING Example: "Alexandre Le"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(:Tag)
(:User)-[:ASKED]->(:Question)
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE q.score < 0 RETURN t.name, count(q) AS usage ORDER BY usage DESC LIMIT 5
samples.prediction: MATCH (q:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag) WHERE q.score < 0 WITH t, count(q) AS q_count ORDER BY q_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN t.name AS tag_name, q_count AS score_count ORDER BY score_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN tag_name, score_count ORDER BY score_count DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN q_count AS question_count ORDER BY question_count ASC LIMIT 5 RETURN q_count AS answer_count ORDER BY answer

samples.question: Find the question with the least number of upvotes and a score greater than the average score of questions tagged with 'aws-lambda'.
samples.schema:
Node properties:
- **Question**
  - `favorites`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `answered`: BOOLEAN 
  - `text`: STRING Example: "### This is:  Bug    ### Specifications  OS: Win10"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62224586/playg"
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2020-06-05T16:57:19Z, Max: 2020-06-05T21:49:16Z
  - `title`: STRING Example: "Playground is not loading with apollo-server-lambd"
  - `id`: INTEGER Min: 62220505, Max: 62224586
  - `upVotes`: INTEGER Example: "0"
  - `score`: INTEGER Example: "-1"
  - `downVotes`: INTEGER Example: "1"
- **Tag**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "aws-lambda"
- **User**
  - `image`: STRING Example: "https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NcFYSuXU0nk/AAA"
  - `link`: STRING Example: "https://stackoverflow.com/users/10251021/alexandre"

  - `reputation`: INTEGER Min: 1, Max: 420137
  - `display_name`: STRING Example: "Alexandre Le"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(:Tag)
(:User)-[:ASKED]->(:Question)
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (t:Tag {name: 'aws-lambda'})<-[:TAGGED]-(q:Question) WITH avg(q.score) AS average_score MATCH (q:Question) WHERE q.score > average_score WITH q ORDER BY q.upVotes ASC RETURN q LIMIT 1

Graph schema: Relevant node labels and their properties (with datatypes) are:
Article {article_id: INTEGER}
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (a:Article{article_id:'1071'})-[r]->() RETURN TYPE(r) AS Relations, COUNT(r) AS Counts
samples.prediction: MATCH (a:Article{article_id:'1071'})-[r]->() RETURN TYPE(r) AS Relations, COUNT(r) AS Counts ORDER BY Counts DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN TYPE(r) AS TypesOfRelationship, COUNT(r) AS Counts ORDER BY Counts DESC LIMIT 1 LIMIT 1024 RETURN TypesOfRelationship, Counts ORDER BY Counts DESC LIMIT 1024 RETURN TypesOfRelationship, Counts ORDER BY Counts DESC LIMIT 10

samples.question: List the distinct properties of nodes that are 2 hops away from Report with report_no equal to PAM-780!
samples.schema:
Graph schema: Relevant node labels and their properties (with datatypes) are:
Report {report_no: STRING}
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (a:Report{report_no:'PAM-780'})-[*2]->(n) RETURN DISTINCT properties(n) AS props

samples.question: Which 3 users have VIP status on the most streams?
samples.schema:
Node properties:
- **Stream**
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2007-05-22T10:39:53.259969Z, Max: 2021-05-09T14:16:40.370294Z
  - `id`: STRING Example: "129004176"
  - `description`: STRING Example: "Welcome to my Channel, I'm Big Chase, 31 living in"
  - `url`: STRING Example: "https://www.twitch.tv/itsbigchase"
  - `name`: STRING Example: "itsbigchase"
  - `followers`: INTEGER Min: 0, Max: 10243195
  - `total_view_count`: INTEGER Min: 21, Max: 1451487256
- **Game**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "Rust"
- **Language**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "en"
- **User**
  - `name`: STRING Example: "itsbigchase"
- **Team**
  - `createdAt`: DATE_TIME Min: 2011-10-11T23:59:43.548701Z, Max: 2021-05-07T17:19:09.946382Z
  - `name`: STRING Example: "ESO Stream Team"
  - `id`: STRING Example: "5893"
Relationship properties:

The relationships:
(:Stream)-[:PLAYS]->(:Game)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_LANGUAGE]->(:Language)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)
(:Stream)-[:HAS_TEAM]->(:Team)
(:Stream)-[:VIP]->(:Stream)
(:Stream)-[:VIP]->(:User)
(:User)-[:CHATTER]->(:Stream)
(:User)-[:CHATTER]->(:User)
(:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(:Stream)
(:User)-[:MODERATOR]->(:User)
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (u:User)-[:VIP]->(s:Stream) WITH u, COUNT(s) AS vip_stream_count ORDER BY vip_stream_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN u.name AS userName, vip_stream_count
samples.prediction: MATCH (u:User)-[:VIP]->(s:Stream) WITH u, count(s) AS streamsVIP ORDER BY streamsVIP DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN u.name AS userName, streamsVIP ORDER BY streamsVIP DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN u.name AS userName, streamsVIP ORDER BY streamsVIP DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN userName AS userName, streamsVIP ORDER BY streamsVIP DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN userName AS userName, streamsVIP ORDER BY streamsVIP DESC LIMIT

samples.question:
How many unique relationships originate from Article where abstract is   The Wakimoto construction for the quantum affine algebra U_q(\hat{sl}_2)
admits a reduction to the q-deformed parafermion algebras. We interpret the
latter theory as a free field realization of the Andrews-Baxter-Forrester
models in regime II. We give multi-particle form factors of some local
operators on the lattice and compute their scaling limit, where the models are
described by a massive field theory with Z_k symmetric minimal scattering
matrices.
?
samples.schema:
Graph schema: Relevant node labels and their properties (with datatypes) are:
Article {abstract: STRING}
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (a:Article{abstract:'  The Wakimoto construction for the quantum affine algebra U_q(\hat{sl}_2) admits a reduction to the q-deformed parafermion algebras. We interpret the latter theory as a free field realization of the Andrews-Baxter-Forrester models in regime II. We give multi-particle form factors of some local operators on the lattice and compute their scaling limit, where the models are described by a massive field theory with Z_k symmetric minimal scattering matrices. '})-[r]->() RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT TYPE(r)) AS rels, TYPE(r)
samples.prediction: MATCH (a:Article{abstract:'  The Wakimoto construction for the quantum affine algebra U_q(\hat{sl}_2) admits a reduction to the q-deformed parafermion algebras. We interpret the latter theory as a free field realization of the Andrews-Baxter-Forrester models in regime II. We give multi-particle form factors of some local operators on the lattice and compute their scaling limit, where the models are described by a massive field theory with Z_k symmetric minimal scattering matrices. '})-[r]->() RETURN COUNT(DIST

samples.question: List characters with the lowest 5 book1PageRanks.
samples.schema:
Node properties:
- **Character**
  - `centrality`: FLOAT Min: 0.0, Max: 1.0
  - `book45PageRank`: FLOAT Min: 0.15000000000000002, Max: 11.409916274911177
  - `fastrf_embedding`: LIST Min Size: 10, Max Size: 10
  - `book1BetweennessCentrality`: FLOAT Min: 0.0, Max: 4638.53495125504
  - `book1PageRank`: FLOAT Min: 0.15000000000000002, Max: 8.164174336296284
  - `louvain`: INTEGER Min: 0, Max: 10
  - `community`: INTEGER Min: 504, Max: 795
  - `degree`: FLOAT Min: 0.0, Max: 300.0
  - `name`: STRING Example: "Addam-Marbrand"
  - `pagerank`: FLOAT Min: 0.15000000000000002, Max: 9.473142454730429
Relationship properties:
- **INTERACTS**
  - `weight: INTEGER` Min: 3, Max:  334
- **INTERACTS1**
  - `weight: INTEGER` Min: 3, Max:  291
  - `book: INTEGER` Min: 1, Max:  1
- **INTERACTS2**
  - `weight: INTEGER` Min: 3, Max:  92
  - `book: INTEGER` Min: 2, Max:  2
- **INTERACTS3**
  - `weight: INTEGER` Min: 3, Max:  95
  - `book: INTEGER` Min: 3, Max:  3
- **INTERACTS45**
  - `weight: INTEGER` Min: 3, Max:  96
  - `book: INTEGER` Min: 45, Max:  45
The relationships:
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS45]->(:Character)
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS]->(:Character)
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS1]->(:Character)
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS3]->(:Character)
(:Character)-[:INTERACTS2]->(:Character)
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book1PageRank IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS character, c.book1PageRank AS pageRank ORDER BY pageRank LIMIT 5
samples.prediction: MATCH (c:Character) WHERE c.book1PageRank IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name, c.book1PageRank ORDER BY c.book1PageRank DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name, c.book1PageRank LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name, c.book1PageRank LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name, c.book1PageRank LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name, c.book1PageRank LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name, c.book1PageRank LIMIT 5 RETURN c.name, c.book

samples.question: Look for the comments of the Article that is not related  to the Report with the  report_id  5049b80a2935f95cc95cf14dbfb8c610!
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (n:Article), (:Report {report_id: '5049b80a2935f95cc95cf14dbfb8c610'}) WHERE NOT (n) --> (:Report) RETURN n.comments

samples.question: For each Article, find the number of Author linked via WRITTEN_BY and retrieve the abstract of the Article and the Author counts in ascending order!
samples.ground_truth: MATCH (n:Article) -[:WRITTEN_BY]->(m:Author) WITH DISTINCT n, m RETURN n.abstract AS abstract, count(m) AS author_count ORDER BY author_count
samples.prediction: MATCH (n:Article) -[:WRITTEN_BY]->(m:Author) WITH DISTINCT n, m RETURN n.abstract AS abstract, count(m) AS count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1 RETURN abstract, count LIMIT 1
